pages.full_text:
Kirby
B15 3JG
86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston, Birmingham
August 8th 2003 - June 2005
pages.notes: This is the volume cover/front matter page. Contains owner name 'Kirby', postcode 'B15 3JG', address '86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston, Birmingham', and date range 'August 8th 2003 - June 2005'. Two photos of the Bayeux Tapestry are glued in (sections showing soldiers with cart and weapons, and ships at sea). The date range gives volume B coverage from August 2003 to June 2005.

Right page contains two photos only — sections of the Bayeux Tapestry showing ships arriving (text visible in tapestry: 'AD PEVENE SAE' i.e. arriving at Pevensey) and a feast scene ('FECERVNT PRANDIVM ET HIC EPISCOPVS CIBV ET POTV BENEDICTI'). No handwritten diary text on this page.
